headline: Realtor.com® and the National Association of REALTORS® Join Forces for Disaster Housing Relief
summary: Realtor.com® and the National Association of REALTORS® today announced a joint effort to support and amplify the work of the REALTORS® Relief Foundation as it marks 25 years of providing housing assistance to families impacted by disasters nationwide.

headline: FCC chair slams broadcasters after Trump disputes reports on Iran-damaged U.S. tankers
summary: FCC Chair Brendan Carr blasted broadcasters shortly after President Donald Trump called reports that Iran struck five U.S. tanker planes "fake news."
